Interface AnimalApplicationService

All Known Implementing Classes:
AnimalApplicationServiceImpl
public interface AnimalApplicationService
Application service for animal management use cases. Orchestrates shelter capacity checks, animal registration, updates, and removals, ensuring audit logging is performed for every state-changing operation.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Cat
    admitCat(String name, String breed, LocalDate birthday, ActivityLevel activityLevel, String shelterId, boolean indoor, boolean neutered)
    Admits a new cat into the specified shelter with cat-specific attributes.
    Dog
    admitDog(String name, String breed, LocalDate birthday, ActivityLevel activityLevel, String shelterId, Dog.Size size, boolean neutered)
    Admits a new dog into the specified shelter with dog-specific attributes.
    Other

    Admits a new animal of an unclassified species into the specified shelter.

  • Method Details

    • admitDog

      Dog admitDog(String name, String breed, LocalDate birthday, ActivityLevel activityLevel, String shelterId, Dog.Size size, boolean neutered)
      Admits a new dog into the specified shelter with dog-specific attributes. Throws an exception if the shelter is not found or is at full capacity.
      Parameters:
      name - the dog's name; must not be null or blank
      breed - the dog's breed; must not be null or blank
      birthday - the dog's date of birth; must not be null
      activityLevel - the dog's activity level; must not be null
      shelterId - the ID of the shelter to admit the dog into; must not be null or blank
      size - the dog's size; must not be null
      neutered - whether the dog is neutered
      Returns:
      the newly created Dog

    • admitCat

      Cat admitCat(String name, String breed, LocalDate birthday, ActivityLevel activityLevel, String shelterId, boolean indoor, boolean neutered)
      Admits a new cat into the specified shelter with cat-specific attributes. Throws an exception if the shelter is not found or is at full capacity.
      Parameters:
      name - the cat's name; must not be null or blank
      breed - the cat's breed; must not be null or blank
      birthday - the cat's date of birth; must not be null
      activityLevel - the cat's activity level; must not be null
      shelterId - the ID of the shelter to admit the cat into; must not be null or blank
      indoor - whether the cat is an indoor cat
      neutered - whether the cat is neutered
      Returns:
      the newly created Cat

    • admitRabbit

      Rabbit admitRabbit(String name, String breed, LocalDate birthday, ActivityLevel activityLevel, String shelterId, Rabbit.FurLength furLength)
      Admits a new rabbit into the specified shelter with rabbit-specific attributes. Throws an exception if the shelter is not found or is at full capacity.
      Parameters:
      name - the rabbit's name; must not be null or blank
      breed - the rabbit's breed; must not be null or blank
      birthday - the rabbit's date of birth; must not be null
      activityLevel - the rabbit's activity level; must not be null
      shelterId - the ID of the shelter to admit the rabbit into; must not be null or blank
      furLength - the rabbit's fur length; must not be null
      Returns:
      the newly created Rabbit

    • admitOther

      Other admitOther(String name, String breed, LocalDate birthday, ActivityLevel activityLevel, String shelterId, String speciesName)
      Admits a new animal of an unclassified species into the specified shelter. Use this method for animals that do not have a dedicated subclass (e.g., fish, parrot, iguana). Throws an exception if the shelter is not found or is at full capacity.
      Parameters:
      name - the animal's name; must not be null or blank
      breed - the animal's breed or description; must not be null or blank
      birthday - the animal's date of birth; must not be null
      activityLevel - the animal's activity level; must not be null
      shelterId - the ID of the shelter to admit the animal into; must not be null or blank
      speciesName - a free-form species description (e.g., "fish"); must not be null or blank
      Returns:
      the newly created Other

    • listAnimals

      List<Animal> listAnimals(String shelterId)
      Returns a list of animals, optionally filtered by shelter. If shelterId is null, all animals in the system are returned. Returns an empty list if no matching animals are found.
      Parameters:
      shelterId - the ID of the shelter to filter by, or null for all animals
      Returns:
      a list of animals matching the filter

    • updateAnimal

      Animal updateAnimal(String animalId, String name, ActivityLevel activityLevel, Boolean neutered)
      Updates an existing animal's mutable fields with the provided values. Only non-null parameters are applied; omitted (null) fields retain their current values. Breed and birthday are immutable and cannot be changed after admission. The neutered flag is only applied when the animal is a Dog or Cat; passing a non-null value for other species has no effect. Throws an exception if the animal is not found.
      Parameters:
      animalId - the ID of the animal to update; must not be null or blank
      name - the new name, or null to keep the current value
      activityLevel - the new activity level, or null to keep the current value
      neutered - the new neutered status, or null to keep the current value
      Returns:
      the updated Animal

    • listAnimalsWithShelterName

      List<AnimalView> listAnimalsWithShelterName(String shelterId)
      Returns a list of AnimalView objects, each pairing an animal with its shelter's display name. Filters by shelter when shelterId is provided, or returns all animals system-wide when shelterId is null. The shelter name is resolved by the Application layer so that callers do not need to perform cross-domain lookups.
      Parameters:
      shelterId - the ID of the shelter to filter by, or null for all animals
      Returns:
      a list of enriched animal views matching the filter

    • removeAnimal

      void removeAnimal(String animalId)
      Removes an animal from the system by ID. Throws an exception if the animal is not found or has a pending adoption request.
      Parameters:
      animalId - the ID of the animal to remove; must not be null or blank
